ksa_text: Ability to conduct risk assessments and analyses of systems, processes, and operational environments to identify, evaluate, and prioritize compliance-related and operational risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-A-001 (RM, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.5150 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.515, eu_ai_act=0.466, ddat=0.420) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.5150 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-A-001 (composite 0.5150) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.5150 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.5150 is not a standard requirement for Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5150, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
